sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ῥώμη

- Transliteration: Rhome

- Phonetic: hro'-may

- Definition: Rome = "strength"

1. the famous capital of the ancient world

- Origin: from the base of G4517

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Location

- Strong's: From the base of G4517; strength; Roma the capital of Italy: - Rome.
